effects_provenance.raw: Lunch Box 3.5g (1/8 oz) Lunch Box is a flavor-packed hybrid that serves sweet nostalgia with a grown-up kick. A cross of Wedding Cake and Project 4516, this strain blends creamy frosting, vanilla gas, and a fruity swirl reminiscent of your favorite childhood treats. The aroma is loud—like a dessert table doused in diesel—with hints of grape, candy, and sugary funk. Expect smooth, expansive smoke and a flavor that lingers long after the exhale. Effects hit in layers: first a euphoric head high that lifts your mood, then a cozy body buzz that melts tension without knocking you out. Ideal for creative afternoons, chill hangs, or whenever you’re craving something sweet with a little punch. Flower Type 1 Flow Gardens

lineage_provenance.raw: lunch box 3.5g (1 8 oz) lunch box is a flavor packed hybrid that serves sweet nostalgia with a grown up kick. a cross of wedding cake and project 4516 this strain blends creamy frosting vanilla gas and a fruity swirl reminiscent of your favorite childhood treats. the aroma is loud—like a dessert table doused in diesel—with hints of grape candy and sugary funk. expect smooth expansive smoke and a flavor that lingers long after the exhale. effects hit in layers first a euphoric head high that lifts your mood then a cozy body buzz that melts tension without knocking you out. ideal for creative afternoons chill hangs or whenever you’re craving something sweet with a little punch. flower type 1 flow gardens

effects_provenance.raw: Slapz 3.5g (1/8 oz) Slapz is an indica-dominant hybrid (Runtz x Grease Monkey) known for its fast-acting, uplifting effects that ease into deep body relaxation. Expect sweet citrus flavors with floral lavender notes, complemented by an aroma of lemon, spice, and subtle diesel. Dense, frosty buds with blue-green hues make this strain as beautiful as it is potent. Flower Hybrid Type 1 Flow Gardens

lineage_provenance.raw: slapz 3.5g (1 8 oz) slapz is an indica dominant hybrid (runtz x grease monkey) known for its fast acting uplifting effects that ease into deep body relaxation. expect sweet citrus flavors with floral lavender notes complemented by an aroma of lemon spice and subtle diesel. dense frosty buds with blue green hues make this strain as beautiful as it is potent. flower hybrid type 1 flow gardens

effects_provenance.raw: Inferno Runtz THCa Flower 1g - Type 1 THCa Shop for Inferno Runtz THCa Flower Strain Inferno Runtz THCa Flower is a flavor-heavy hybrid with deeply relaxing effects and a sweet, creamy profile. Bred from Dante’s Inferno × Runtz, this indica-leaning strain blends fruity dessert notes with full-body calm, perfect for end-of-day unwinding. From berry and vanilla sweetness to tropical funk and sugary cookie undertones, Inferno Runtz hits every sensory note. Shop now for small-batch, indoor-grown THCa flower at Hemp Hop. Inferno Runtz Strain Highlights Type: Indica-Dominant Hybrid (60–70% Indica) Parent Strains: Dante’s Inferno × Runtz Flavors: Berry, vanilla cream, fruity candy, tropical citrus, sweet and nutty Aroma: Sugary strawberries, creamy vanilla, pineapple spice, earthy and sweet Effects: Relaxin g, euphoric, sleepy, sociable, calming, uplifting THCa - 25.34% What is Inferno Runtz Strain? Inferno Runtz THCa Flower blends the dessert-forward flavor of Dante’s Inferno with the tropical punch of classic Runtz. The result is a sweet, creamy, fruit-layered smoke that settles into a deep, relaxing high. The experience begins with a gentle mental lift, bringing clarity, calm, and social ease. Over time, the body effects deepen, melting tension, soothing stress, and leaving you in a state of couch-locked bliss. Expect flavor, aroma, and effects that go the distance. Infern o Runtz Strain Cannabinoids THCa: 25.34% Total Cannabinoids: 26.56% Inferno Runtz Strain Terpenes Caryophyllene Myrcene Limonene Inferno Runtz THCa Effects This hybrid leans into full-body comfort and smooth mental clarity: Sweet euphoric lift followed by deep relaxation Social, happy energy early on Ends in couchlock and restful sleep Great for nighttime use or post-work decompression Type Indica-Dominant Hybrid – ideal for late-day or evening use Why Choose Hemp Hop for Inferno Runtz Strain? At Hemp Hop, we focus on rich flavor, lasting effects, and reliable quality. Our Inferno Runtz THCa Flower is: Indoor-grown and small-batch sourced Cold-cured and hand-trimmed to preserve terpenes Lab-tested for potency, compliance, and safety Hemp Flower contains less than .3% Delta 9 THC For Adult Use Only Already vibin’??? 👉Might as well explore the full High THCa Flower collection. effects_provenance.raw: Black Ice Runtz THCa Weight: 14g Black Ice Runtz THCa is an indica-dominant strain that tests at 30.86% THCa. The effects are soothing and heavy through the body with a calm, quiet headspace that makes it easy to power down for the night. The flavors are dark berries and fruit like cherries and plums, earthy hash, and pepper with a touch of pine. effects_provenance.raw: Blackberry Super Boof - THCA Flower - Indoor Top Cut Exotic 28 grams Blackberry Super Boof – A Relaxing and Flavorful Hybrid Blackberry Super Boof is a balanced hybrid strain that delivers a delightful blend of fruity sweetness and calming relaxation. Featuring a rich flavor profile of ripe blackberries, earthy undertones, and a hint of floral accents, this strain is as enjoyable on the palate as it is in its soothing effects. A versatile choice, Blackberry Super Boof is perfect for enjoying during the evening or when you need to unwind without losing mental clarity. Terpene Profile Blackberry Super Boof’s distinct flavor and effects come from its well-crafted terpene combination: Myrcene : Contributes to its earthy and herbal notes while promoting full-body relaxation. Limonene : Adds a bright citrus hint that uplifts the mood and enhances the fruity flavors. Caryophyllene : Introduces a touch of spice and plays a role in easing stress and tension. Linalool : Brings soothing floral aromas that enhance the calming experience. Effects Blackberry Super Boof delivers a wave of gentle euphoria that promotes relaxation while keeping the mind clear and uplifted. Its balanced effects allow you to release physical tension and enjoy a mellow, calming experience, all while staying mentally engaged. Ideal for unwinding after a long day or enjoying a laid-back evening, this strain provides the perfect mix of calm and focus. The blend of fruity flavor and tranquil effects makes Blackberry Super Boof a sought-after strain for those needing both relaxation and a refreshing sensory experience. CALM CARYOPHYLLENE FOCUSED LIMONENE MYRCENE NC INVENTORY Out of stock retail flower Sungrown UPLIFTED UPLIFTING Gold Standard

effects_provenance.raw: Super Boof THCA Flower Essential / 28g Strain Profile Super Boof THCA Flower is a balanced hybrid bred from Black Cherry Punch crossed with Tropicana Cookies . The cultivar earned Leafly's Strain of the Year in 2024 on the strength of its vibrant citrus flavor and versatile effects — producing dense, colorful buds with strong bag appeal and a layered aromatic profile. Effects Super Boof delivers a versatile, well-rounded high that suits a wide range of moments. The cerebral lift is mood-lifting and clear-headed; the body baseline stays comfortable and mobile — making this a flexible cultivar for daytime use, social settings, or evening flavor-led wind-down. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: vibrant citrus up front, with sweet ripe cherry through the middle and a layered cookie-cream finish on the exhale. Smoke is smooth and unmistakably bright. The terpene profile reads citrus-cherry-and-cream — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Super Boof harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Super Boof THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Super Boof THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. Cherry Citrus hybrid Sweet THCA Flower Lost In Translation

effects_provenance.raw: Gelonade THCA Flower Essential / 28g Strain Profile Gelonade THCA Flower is a sativa-dominant hybrid bred from Lemon Tree crossed with Gelato #41 . The cross delivers a bright, citrus-forward aromatic profile with the dense, trichome-rich structure expected from Gelato lineage — visually clean buds with serious bag appeal. Effects Gelonade is a daytime cultivar through and through. Onset is energizing and clearly euphoric — pairs well with creative work, focus tasks, or social settings — before settling into a relaxed, mobile body baseline. A sharp, productive high without anxious tension. Great for users who want lift without losing their day. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: bright lemon citrus up front, with sweet fruit-candy through the middle and a creamy, dessert-leaning finish on the exhale. Smoke is smooth and unmistakably refreshing. The terpene profile reads limonene-forward with a creamy gelato backbone — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Gelonade harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Gelonade THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Gelonade THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. Fruit Lemon sativa Sweet THCA Flower Lost In Translation

effects_provenance.raw: Granddaddy Purple (GDP) THCa Flower 1g - Type 1 THCa Shop for Granddaddy Purple THCa Flower Strain Granddaddy Purple High THCa Flower , also known as GDP, is a legendary indica strain loved for its deep relaxation and signature grape-berry flavor. A cross between Big Bud and Purple Urkle, this classic cultivar delivers a euphoric head rush followed by a slow, full-body melt. Known as the “grandfather of all weed strains,” Granddaddy Purple is ideal for night use, stress relief, or just letting go. Shop this potent indica now at Hemp Hop. Granddaddy Purple THCa Flower is a full-bodied indica known for its calming high and nostalgic flavor. The experience begins with a euphoric cerebral rush, followed by a dreamy mental haze and deep physical relaxation. Loved for its potential to ease stress, promote sleep, and stimulate appetite, GDP is a trusted favorite among seasoned smokers and beginners alike. effects_provenance.raw: Gelato Bremix THCa Flower (Triploid) 1g - Type 1 THCa Shop for Gelato Bremix THCa Flower Gelato Bremix THCa Flower is a premium triploid strain with bold personality and true dessert appeal. Coated in frosty trichomes and bursting with creamy, candy-like sweetness, this flower delivers a euphoric head rush with a deep body melt that eases stress without couchlock. With over 25% THCa and an eye-catching finish, Gelato Bremix is made for those who want powerful effects, top-shelf flavor, and an ultra-smooth burn. What Are THCa Triploid Flowers? THCa triploid flowers are bred with 3 sets of chromosomes instead of the usual 2. This unique genetic makeup makes them naturally seedless , allowing the plant to channel more energy into producing dense, potent, and terpene-rich buds. The result? A smoother smoke, bold flavors, and elevated THCa levels. At Hemp Hop, we bring you the best in next-gen genetics, always curated with care. We would love for you to try these and experience the difference for yourself. Gelato Bremix THCa Flower Highlights Type : THCa Flower (Triploid) Dominant Terpenes : Caryophyllene, Linalool, Myrcene, Limonene Flavors : Creamy candy, sweet citrus, light spice Aroma : Floral, sugary, earthy, slightly gassy THCa : 25.87% Effects : Euphoric, relaxed, happy, tingly What is Gelato Bremix THCa Flower? Gelato Bremix is a triploid THCa flower that leans heavy on dessert terps while delivering clean, powerful effects. Each bud is packed with visible trichomes and a loud aroma that hits as soon as you open the jar. Expect creamy candy sweetness on the inhale with smooth notes of citrus and light floral spice on the exhale. This triploid strain is built for flavor, potency, and structure. Gelato Bremix Effects Gelato Bremix offers a strong head high that builds into a full-body glow. You’ll feel mentally light and physically at ease without full sedation. Best used during the afternoon or evening for: Mood elevation Body relaxation Creative flow Wind-down sessions Gelato Bremix Cannabinoids THCa : 25.87% Δ9-THC : 0.24% Total Cannabinoids : 26.92% Gelato Bremix Terpenes Caryophyllene – Peppery and grounding, known to relax the body Linalool – Floral and calming, promotes gentle relaxation Myrcene – Earthy and sedating, enhances body effects Limonene – Bright and citrusy, boosts mood and clarity Why Choose Hemp Hop for Gelato Bremix THCa Flower Premium indoor or greenhouse-grown flower Rich terpene profil
